TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Khpan, title = Khpan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Khpan} }

S.FORM: alang Khpan ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 30 buwan, 91 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 80 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 11 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 75%, Amis 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 10%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Khpan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Khpan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Khpan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Khpan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Khpan hya' ga Kawbu'. tay mkyahu' na Khpan hya' ga Raga'. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Khpan ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 30 buwan, 91 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 80 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 11 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 75%, Amis 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 10%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Khpan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Khpan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Khpan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Khpan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Khpan hya' ga Kawbu'. tay mkyahu' na Khpan hya' ga Raga'. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kħpan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli **%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kħpan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na kħpan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kħpan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na kħpan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na kħpan ħjaʔ ɣa kawβuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kħpan ħjaʔ ɣa raɣaʔ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
